parsed_review.summary: CP00-218 closes the RP06.P05.M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (RP06.P05.M06.S09-S18, risk A, 10 units) as a descriptor-only pack, and the production_ready posture is correctly supported and not overclaimed. Identity and scope are consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, next-pack-queue.json (live head = CP00-218, live_latest CP00-217, live_next S09), dms-core-contract.json (current_pack + current_pack_id CP00-218 and fixture_set_tail_descriptor projection), registry.js (DMS_CORE_CP218_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS/NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION), service.js, validators.js, and model.test.js (upstream CP00-217, next CP00-219/S19). Deliverable distribution matches the baseline exactly (implementation 3, security_audit 2, fixture 1, test 3, hermes_evidence 1; micro_title "Synthetic Fixture Set" x10), enforced by validateDmsCoreCp218Coverage. All 7 required public exports exist (createDmsCoreCp218FixtureSetTailCaseSet/Descriptor in service.js; validateDmsCoreCp218Coverage, validateDmsCoreCp218FixtureSetTailDescriptor, createDmsCoreCp218HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff in validators.js) and are re-exported via index.js. No-write/no-real-data/no-runtime boundaries are enforced both by the validators and asserted by tests (row guards cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, unauthorized_data_omitted:true, dispatches_ai_runtime:false, fixture_payload_included:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, claude_final_approval_claimed:false), and the source contains no fs/child_process/fetch/process.env/network usage — it is genuinely descriptor-only data plus pure validation. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (tools Read/Grep/Glob; claude_is_final_approval:false; promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), and Hermes appears only as a deterministic evidence/receipt descriptor (no_hermes_runtime_receipt), not product runtime; enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation. The manifest is correctly in-flight: production_ready:false / status implemented_pending_review, with production_ready_candidate true; the three not-yet-present evidence files (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are properly deferred to the post-review hardening steps, matching the closed CP00-217 precedent. All 18 pre-review validation commands are recorded exit 0 (incl. npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, rp06:dms-core:validate, git diff --check); post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:validate, generate, git diff --check --cached) are appropriately deferred. The auth preflight produced clean JSON with exit 0 (no auth failure, no 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output), and unrelated dirty files (apps/api scaffolding, UI workstream) are preserved and not claimed by the pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found; the pack is sound for the next hardening step, with human final approval still required for any enterprise-trust claim.
